title: Dragon and Fairy Descendants
summary: The legend of the noble origins of the Vietnamese people, as children of the Dragon and grandchildren of the Fairy.

slides.text: Once upon a time, in the land of Lac Viet, there was a god named Lac Long Quan, belonging to the Dragon lineage, with matchless strength.
slides.imagePrompt: Lac Long Quan, a powerful dragon god in ancient Vietnamese style, standing near the sea, water swirling, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors, flat design

slides.text: In the high northern mountains lived the exceptionally beautiful Au Co, who belonged to the Fairy lineage.
slides.imagePrompt: Au Co, a beautiful fairy goddess, standing on a lush green mountain with flowers, ethereal atmosphere, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors, flat design

slides.text: Lac Long Quan and Au Co met, fell in love, and became husband and wife.
slides.imagePrompt: Lac Long Quan and Au Co meeting in a beautiful landscape combining mountains and sea, romantic and mythical, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors, flat design

slides.text: A short time later, Au Co gave birth to a sack of one hundred eggs. Miraculously, the egg sack hatched into one hundred healthy sons.
slides.imagePrompt: Au Co with a magical glowing sack of 100 eggs, children hatching out, miraculous scene, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors, flat design

slides.text: Lac Long Quan said: 'I am a Dragon, you are a Fairy; it is difficult for us to stay in one place long'. He took 50 children to the sea, and she took 50 to the mountains.
slides.imagePrompt: Lac Long Quan leading 50 children to the sea, Au Co leading 50 children to the mountains, split scene, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors, flat design

slides.text: The eldest son who followed Au Co was honored as king, with the title of Hung King, naming the country Van Lang.
slides.imagePrompt: The eldest son crowned as Hung King, villagers cheering, flags flying, ancient Vietnamese setting, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors, flat design

slides.text: From then on, the Vietnamese people have always proudly called themselves the 'Children of the Dragon and Grandchildren of the Fairy'.
slides.imagePrompt: Vietnamese people from all walks of life standing together, unity, pride, dragon and fairy silhouettes in the sky, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors, flat design

slides.question: Which lineage did Lac Long Quan belong to?
What special thing did Au Co give birth to?
options: A sack of one hundred eggs
slides.answer: A sack of one hundred eggs

slides.question: How many children followed their mother to the mountains?
What do Vietnamese people proudly call themselves?
options: Children of the Dragon and Grandchildren of the Fairy
Children of the sky and earth
slides.answer: Children of the Dragon and Grandchildren of the Fairy
